title: mimnesko #3403
definition:
1) to remind
    1a) to be recalled or to return to one's mind,
        to remind one's self of, to remember
    1b) to be recalled to mind, to be remembered, had in remembrance
    1c) to remember a thing
    1d) be mindful of
nasbUsage:
